title: Billing Races & Integrity — Implementation Plan
summary: TDD-structured implementation plan for four medium-severity billing race conditions and integrity findings from May 2026 audits, with 5 tasks covering unique indexing, locking disciplines, and concurrent safety.
notes: Manifest explicitly types as DOC. Document is a comprehensive TDD-shaped implementation plan with 5 sequenced tasks (verification, then 4 fixes, then browser smoke+simplify+PR). Purpose is supporting context and execution guidance for shipped work (PR #12 per memory); produces context only, not requirements or locked decisions.
